name: Crop Pest Detection System
description: An AI-powered system that detects and classifies crop pests from images, helping farmers identify infestations early and take timely action.
problem: Farmers often struggle to identify pest infestations early, leading to crop damage, reduced yield, and overuse of pesticides due to misdiagnosis.
solution: Developed a computer vision model that analyzes crop images to detect and classify pest types, enabling faster and more accurate decision-making.
features: Image-based pest detection using trained deep learning model
Supports multiple pest categories and crop types
Simple interface for uploading crop images
Fast prediction with probability confidence scores
info: Trained a convolutional neural network (CNN) on labeled crop image data to classify different pest types. Focused on improving model accuracy and generalization across varying image conditions.
future_improvements: Deploy model for mobile usage in low-resource environments
Expand dataset to include more pest categories
Provide treatment recommendations based on detected pest
